stemHtml: The reason for using different frequencies for the airborne and ground equipment of a DME is…

options.a: to avoid second trace returns when a DME is more than 200 NM away.
options.b: that side lobes can be suppressed by the Side Lobe Suppressor (SLS).
options.c: to prevent that DME interrogation pulse pairs being received by the aircraft after reflection on the earth surface.
options.d: that more DME frequencies are available for different beacons.
